/CAL SENTENCING/TWS/CH2 ISS PROB PROB 3 Y PJ  15D/CTS 1   /SWAPD 02-27-14PF460 12/VF2:150/DDP2/X:DEFENDANT IS TO COMPLETE THE 18 MONTH PROGRAM/LSUSF:12/LVAL/LCHEM/X:IF THE DEFENDANT OWNS A CAR IN HER NAME, SHE IS ORDERED NOT TO DRIVE A VEHICLE UNLESS IT IS EQUIPPED WITH A CERTIFIED IGNITION INTERLOCK DEVICE FOR APERIOD OF 1 YEAR/CTORD:DEFENDANT OFF OF SOBER LINK AS OF TODAY/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBERPRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/987,2/CTORD: DEFT TO ENROLL IN SOBERLINK ALCOHOL MONITORING & SHOWPROOF TO COURT AT NEXT COURT DATE/CONTD:TO SET PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & PROOF OF SOBERLINK/DOP/

/CAL DISPO/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 29/TRANS 29 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL:TO SET PTC & PROOF OF SOBERLINK/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
